form.formComment: Drawn the inside. At the last start finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 6 over 300m at this track behind Bogie Becker beaten 0.9 lengths (16.88). Top-three hope with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Sent out long odds last time but rocketed out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a nose second (19.99) over 352m at Q Lakeside. Should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (26.01) at Q Lakeside in a Grade 5, finishing sixth and beaten 7 lengths. Placed at all four starts from this draw. Can feature with the right run.

form.formComment: Started big odds last time but hit the ground running with a slick early split, giving a sight but fading out of it to finish fifth (18.99) at this track over 350m. Others favoured this time.

form.formComment: Has hit the frame at her last three runs, the latest finishing second in 29.29 at Townsville. Tricky draw to overcome. Has ability and should run well.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th over 352m at Q Lakeside beaten 17 lengths (20.87) behind Ellie Unleashed in a Grade 5 on March 31. Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.
